topic: expanded form of decimals using fractions
latex:
Which expression shows $123.408$ in expanded form?

A. $(1 \times 100) + (2 \times 10) + (3 \times 1) + \left(4 \times \frac{1}{10}\right) + \left(8 \times \frac{1}{1,000}\right)$

B. $(1 \times 100) + (2 \times 10) + (3 \times 1) + \left(4 \times \frac{1}{100}\right) + \left(8 \times \frac{1}{1,000}\right)$

C. $(1 \times 100) + (2 \times 10) + (3 \times 1) + \left(4 \times \frac{1}{100}\right) + \left(8 \times \frac{1}{10,000}\right)$

D. $(1 \times 100) + (2 \times 10) + (3 \times 1) + \left(4 \times \frac{1}{10}\right) + \left(8 \times \frac{1}{100}\right)$
